content_of_post_to_comment:
It’s so fucking exhausting. Nobody is happy here. Everyone thinks the world is going to end. Nobody has goals or ambitions.

They just want you to be fucking miserable
comment: Sounds like you're stuck around a lot of doom-heavy people or spaces where everything gets filtered through worst-case thinking. When that becomes the default, it really does feel like no one has direction. Do you think it's your actual environment or more what you're exposed to online?
